title: Bubbletastic Bubbles 3’s – Fun Party Bubble Toys, Long-Lasting Soap Bubbles, Kids Outdoor Play & Party Favors
features: Pack of 3 bubble solution bottles Produces bright, long-lasting bubbles Ideal for outdoor play, parties, and celebrations Easy-to-use wand included in each bottle Suitable for children’s play and family fun
description: Product description Bubbletastic Bubbles Pack of 3 is a fun and colourful bubble set designed to provide hours of entertainment for children. Each bottle is filled with high-quality bubble solution that creates strong, long-lasting bubbles, perfect for outdoor play, parties, and everyday fun. Easy to use and suitable for little hands, this pack is ideal for sharing and group activities. Safety Warning For extanal use only
